title: Karakoram Traverse
brief: Glacier-fed valleys, high-pass acclimatization, and convoy movement along the spine of the Karakoram Highway.

title: Baltoro Field Line
brief: A disciplined approach toward granite towers, cold rivers, and weather windows measured in hours.

title: Deosai Plateau Watch
brief: Open-sky plateau reconnaissance across alpine grasslands, river crossings, and brown bear country.
